title: Better Snow
description: This texture pack improves snowflakes for a more stunning look!
body:
![TITLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a21ab007ccd979188bbde58d99f08c834e25cfe0.png)

### **Hi!**

This texture pack refines the design of **snowflakes**, adding more detail and realism to create a visually improved winter effect!

![Wallpaper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ca92694a68ad0bf7af4723bde129d94112a4d8b.png)

## Compatible with Version: from 1.16.2 to 1.21.11!

**Enjoy!**

![Snowflake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bae0ec2f8be63c4454427842158ced432a415af.png)

Lordd727
